Entry.JapaneseText: どーーーーーしてくれるの！！？
Entry.EnglishText: What are you gonna do about this?!!

Entry.JapaneseText: あなたが寝坊したせいで エミルとのデートに遅刻しちゃったじゃない！
Entry.EnglishText: I ended up being late for my date with Emil because you overslept!

Entry.JapaneseText: ミソが……。 限定品でなかなか手に入らないミソが……
Entry.EnglishText: That miso... was limited edition and difficult to even get...

Entry.JapaneseText: この責任、どうとってくれるの！？
Entry.EnglishText: How are you going to take responsibility for this?!

Entry.JapaneseText: すまない。 次の船賃は安くしてやる
Entry.EnglishText: Sorry. I'll lower your next boatride charge.

Entry.JapaneseText: クーリッジ。 謝るならもっと反省してる 感じを出した方がいいと思うのだが……
Entry.EnglishText: Coolidge... if you're going to apologize, you should at least consider putting more sympathy into the apology.

Entry.JapaneseText: 全然反省してないみたいね！ もう許せない！ エミルと私を引き裂いた罪は重いんだから！
Entry.EnglishText: Looks to me like he hasn't considered it at all! I won't forgive you for this! It's a crime to pull me apart from Emil!

Entry.JapaneseText: ミソの恨み……この脚で 存分に味あわせてあげるよ
Entry.EnglishText: These legs of mine... will show him the taste of the miso's grudge.

Entry.JapaneseText: あぁ、やっぱりこうなるのか……
Entry.EnglishText: Ahh... I figured it would end up like this...
